creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Hello Robert,
it is indeed intended, updates for oci-cli depend on specific py-oci versions and the same thing was done for older updates, too.

Please check:
 * https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269534
 * https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=270401
 * https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269148

Let me know if you need anything else
